module.name: bubble
module.description: A speech bubble / callout with a pointing tail. Body shape (ellipse, rectangle, rounded, cloud), tail direction/length, fill, border and text. Move / resize / rotate on the preview in Edit layout.
module.aiSpec: A free-floating speech or thought bubble with a pointing tail — for annotating or commenting on something on the slide. Block module: the body is the text inside the bubble. Shape (`type`: rounded/rectangle/ellipse/cloud) and tail `angle`/`length` are parameters; position/size come from x/y/w/h and it can be moved/resized/rotated on the preview. Use `tailtype: thought` for a thinking cloud. Example: `<!-- @bubble type: rounded, x: 50, y: 35, w: 32, h: 18, angle: 110 -->`.

param.name: tailwidth
param.label: Tail width
param.desc: Pointer tail base width, in degrees

snippet.label: Speech bubble
snippet.text: <!-- @bubble type: rounded, x: 50, y: 35, w: 32, h: 18, angle: 110, length: 22 --> Hello! <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A speech bubble with a tail. type: rounded|rectangle|ellipse|cloud.

snippet.label: Thought cloud
snippet.text: <!-- @bubble type: cloud, x: 50, y: 35, w: 30, h: 22, angle: 120, length: 18 --> Hmm… <!-- @end -->
